title: Travel and Expense Policy
text: Employees may book economy class for trips under 5 hours. Business class requires VP approval for trips of 5 hours or more. Travel receipts must be submitted within 10 days after the trip ends. Hotel limit in Stockholm is 220 EUR per night.

title: Hybrid Work Policy
text: Employees are expected to work from an office at least 2 days per week unless a manager-approved exemption is in place. Core collaboration hours are 09:00 to 15:00 local time.

title: Support Service Levels
text: Sev-1 incidents must be acknowledged within 15 minutes and updates posted every 30 minutes until mitigation. Standard support hours are 08:00 to 18:00 Central European Time Monday through Friday.

title: Data Processing Addendum
text: DPA-v3 is the current approved template for EU customers. All new EU contracts signed on or after March 3, 2026 must use DPA-v3.

title: Leadership Team
text: Karin Dahl is CEO. Jonas Reed is CFO. Lina Chen is VP Product. Mikael Holm is Head of Operations. Nora Svensson is Head of People.

title: Office Directory
text: The company operates offices in Stockholm, London, and Paris. Stockholm office address is Sveavägen 44. London office address is 77 Kingsway. Paris office address is 12 Rue de Rivoli.

title: Product Roadmap Q2
text: Project Aurora beta is targeted for April 2 pending QA sign-off. Usage Alerts is planned for the May sprint. Single sign-on improvements are exploratory and not committed for Q2.

title: Security Review Process
text: Customer security reviews are coordinated by the security team. The standard turnaround for initial questionnaire review is 5 business days. Priya Menon is the security program manager.

title: Approval Matrix
text: Invoices above 25000 EUR require CFO approval before being sent. Discounts above 20 percent require CFO approval. Annual contracts above 100000 EUR require both CFO and CEO review.

title: Q2 Messaging Guide
text: The approved Q2 campaign slogan is 'Make every metric actionable'. The previous quarter's tagline should no longer be used in external materials.

title: Board Meeting Schedule
text: The Q1 board meeting is scheduled for March 23, 2026. Internal board deck review is due by March 18.

title: New Joiners March
text: Sara Nordin joins as Customer Success Manager on March 1, 2026. She reports to the VP of Customer Success, Daniel Fors.

title: Feature Flags Reference
text: The feature flag aurora_beta_enabled controls access to Project Aurora beta. Flags are managed by the product operations team.

title: Customer Training Catalog
text: Standard analyst training is offered in 90-minute remote sessions for groups up to 30 participants. Advanced admin training is a 2-part series.

title: FY27 Planning Calendar
text: Department heads must submit FY27 planning assumptions by April 1, 2026. Finance will consolidate the first draft by April 8.
